@pytest.fixture(scope="session", autouse=True)
    def build_app():
        """Build the Next.js app once with NEXT_PUBLIC_ZEALT_RUN_ID exported."""
        env = os.environ.copy()
        env["NEXT_PUBLIC_ZEALT_RUN_ID"] = RUN_ID
    
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["npm", "run", "build"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            env=env,
            timeout=600,
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 0, (
            f"`npm run build` failed (exit {result.returncode}).\n"
            f"STDOUT:\n{result.stdout}\nSTDERR:\n{result.stderr}"
        )
E       AssertionError: `npm run build` failed (exit -9).
E         STDOUT:
E         
E         > liveblocks-cursor-positions@0.1.0 build
E         > next build
E         
E           ▲ Next.js 14.2.15
E         
E            Creating an optimized production build ...
E         
E         STDERR:
E         
E       assert -9 == 0
E        +  where -9 = CompletedProcess(args=['npm', 'run', 'build'], returncode=-9, stdout='\n> liveblocks-cursor-positions@0.1.0 build\n> next build\n\n  ▲ Next.js 14.2.15\n\n   Creating an optimized production build ...\n', stderr='').returncode
